name: Subway Surfers Match
author: Poki
description: Subway Surfers Match is a fun and colorful match-3 game where you help Jake create his coolest graffiti ever! Match at least 3 tiles of the same color or shape to crush them, reach each level’s goal, and earn golden spray cans which Jake uses to complete his graffiti masterpiece! Combine tiles to create awesome power-ups and clear the board in style. Ready to match, paint, and play? How to play Subway Surfers Match? Click or tap to swap tiles and match three or more tiles! Who created Subway Surfers Match? Subway Surfers Match is created by Sybo. Play their other games on Poki: Subway Surfers and Subway Surfers Blast ! How can I play Subway Surfers Match for free? You can play Subway Surfers Match for free on Poki. Can I play Subway Surfers Match on mobile devices and desktop? Subway Surfers Match can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
